german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with 57% of positions accessible without German proficiency.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between customer-facing and core PM roles, indicating potential accessibility constraints.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the positions are filled by senior-level professionals.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce prefers on-site arrangements, highlighting limited flexibility in work modes.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 40% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
